title: libanotis hedgeana
intro: Libanotis hedgeana, also known as Greek mountain tea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Greece. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Libanotis hedgeana include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as having antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. Libanotis hedgeana can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions.
